project: type: website

website: title: "M10 Assignment" navbar: left: - href: index.qmd text: Home - href: dashboard.qmd text: Dashboard - href: shiny-apps.qmd text: Shiny Apps - href: shinylive.qmd text: Shinylive

format: html: theme: cosmo toc: true

```         
# Home
```

## About Me

![](images/Screenshot 2026-04-12 at 5.30.12 PM.png)

I am currently a college student interested in marketing and business-related positions.

## Career Aspiration

My goal is to pursue a career in marketing or a similar field where I can apply communication and organizational skills in a professional setting.

## Skills

-   Communication\
-   Teamwork\
-   Time Management\
-   Organization

## Education

Ontario High School, CA\
High School Diploma (2023)
